mapper.insert: INSERT INTO evd_task_evidence_resolution ( resolution_id, tenant_id, project_id, task_id, configuration_bundle_id, configuration_bundle_digest, stage_code, source_event_id, source_event_digest, resolver_version, slot_count, resolved_at) VALUES (#{resolutionId}, #{tenantId}, #{projectId}, #{taskId}, #{bundleId}, #{bundleDigest}, #{stageCode}, #{sourceEventId}, #{sourceEventDigest}, #{resolverVersion}, #{slotCount}, #{resolvedAt})

INSERT INTO evd_evidence_slot ( slot_id, tenant_id, project_id, task_id, resolution_id, template_version_id, template_key, template_version, template_digest, requirement_code, occurrence_key, requirement_name, media_type, required_flag, min_count, max_count, condition_input_digest, resolution_explanation, requirement_definition, requirement_digest, status_projection, resolved_at) VALUES
(CAST(#{slot.slotId} AS uuid), #{slot.tenantId}, CAST(#{slot.projectId} AS uuid), CAST(#{slot.taskId} AS uuid), CAST(#{slot.resolutionId} AS uuid), CAST(#{slot.templateVersionId} AS uuid), #{slot.templateKey}, #{slot.templateVersion}, #{slot.templateDigest}, #{slot.requirementCode}, #{slot.occurrenceKey}, #{slot.requirementName}, #{slot.mediaType}, #{slot.required}, #{slot.minCount}, #{slot.maxCount}, #{slot.conditionInputDigest}, CAST(#{slot.explanation} AS jsonb), CAST(#{slot.definition} AS jsonb), #{slot.requirementDigest}, #{slot.status}, #{slot.resolvedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT count(*) FROM evd_task_evidence_resolution WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND task_id = CAST(#{taskId} AS uuid)

SELECT slot_id AS "slotId", resolution_id AS "resolutionId", task_id AS "taskId", project_id AS "projectId", template_version_id AS "templateVersionId", template_key AS "templateKey", template_version AS "templateVersion", template_digest AS "templateDigest", requirement_code AS "requirementCode", occurrence_key AS "occurrenceKey", requirement_name AS "requirementName", media_type AS "mediaType", required_flag AS "required", min_count AS "minCount", max_count AS "maxCount", condition_input_digest AS "conditionInputDigest", resolution_explanation::text AS "explanation", requirement_definition::text AS "definition", requirement_digest AS "requirementDigest", status_projection AS "status", resolved_at AS "resolvedAt" FROM evd_evidence_slot WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND task_id = CAST(#{taskId} AS uuid) ORDER BY template_key, template_version, requirement_code, occurrence_key, slot_id
